summary: A/B Testing, Funnel Tracking, and GA4 Analytics Features Verification - Iteration 126. All features verified working: A/B testing shows variant A/B on landing page, funnel tracking events fire correctly across all pages, GA4EventTester admin page has all funnel and A/B test buttons.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Failed to load billing data' toast - products API requires auth (pre-existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: analytics.js: A/B testing functions (getABVariant, initABTest, trackExperimentView, trackExperimentConversion) all properly exported
analytics.js: Funnel tracking functions (trackFunnelStep, trackFunnelComplete, trackFunnelAbandon, FUNNEL_STEPS) all properly exported
Landing.js: A/B test initialized on mount (line 48), shows Variant A or B indicator in dev mode, tracks experiment_view and funnel_step landing_view
Landing.js: handleCTAClick tracks experiment_conversion and signup_start funnel step
Signup.js: trackFunnelStep('signup_start') on page load, trackFunnelStep('signup_complete') after successful registration
Billing.js: trackFunnelStep('checkout_start') when purchase starts, trackFunnelStep('purchase_complete') and trackFunnelComplete after successful payment
GifMaker.js: trackFunnelStep('first_generation') on GIF generation, trackFunnelStep('first_download') on download
GA4EventTester.js: 15 event trigger buttons including funnel_step, experiment_view, experiment_conversion with proper event firing
context_for_next_testing_agent: A/B testing and funnel tracking fully implemented and verified. A/B test variant persists in localStorage. Funnel data stored in localStorage. Session ID in sessionStorage. GA4EventTester admin page at /app/admin/ga4-tester has all buttons working.
